pom.xml.general_idea: Reverted Spring Boot parent version from 3.4.4 to 3.2.3.
Updated the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Commented out the explicit Lombok version to rely on the Spring Boot BOM managed version.
Added Spring Boot Starter Data JPA dependency for ORM support.
Added explicit Jakarta Persistence API dependency.
Added explicit Jakarta Transaction API dependency.
Added Spring Boot Starter Security dependency for authentication and authorization.
Added Spring Boot Starter Validation dependency for bean validation.
Added JJWT API dependency for JWT token handling.
Added JJWT implementation dependency for runtime JWT processing.
Added JJWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization of JWTs.
